calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Order Removing Successor Trustee Joseph Shaber
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For Order Removing Successor Trustee Joseph Shaber
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Continued To Oct-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Joseph Shaber (Trustee/Respondent). Aaron Minnis for Robert Johnson (Petitioner).

Mr. Conrad stated that they another mediation again, that they settled again and that the revision of the settlement agreement was to be circulated today. The matter was continued to October 20, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Verified Petition For Order Removing Successor Trustee Joseph Shaber
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Continued To Sep-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Murken for Abraham Shaber (now deceased). Daniel Conrad for and with Joseph Shaber. Aaron Minnis for Robert Johnson (Petitioner).

Mr. Conrad reported that two mediations occurred, that they had reached a settlement, that he prepared the settlement agreement, that Counsel approved it as to form but that Abraham died before signing it. In addition, Mr. Conrad requested a 90 day continuance so that they could continue negotiations. The matter was continued to September 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a status conference. The Court ordered that mediation occur before the next hearing date.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Verified Petition For Order Removing Successor Trustee Joseph Shaber
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Continued To Jul-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Joseph Shaber (Co-Trustee).

Mr. Conrad stated that he received a call from Mr. Mattingly stating that he was not feeling well and that he was going to request a two week continuance. The matter was continued to July 22, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Conrad is to notify all Counsel of the new hearing date.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Verified Petition For Order Removing Successor Trustee Joseph Shaber
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Continued To Jul-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Murken for and with Abraham David Shaber. Daniel Conrad for and with Joesph Saber. David Mattingly for the Petitioner.

Mr. Mattingly stated that discovery needed to be completed, requested a continuance after July 4th to report to the Court, for an evidentiary hearing and to have witnesses testify. Mr. Conrad also stated that discovery needed to be conducted. Mr. Murkin stated that he was here to make sure David stayed in control of his life. The Court signed an order referring the matter to mediation which is to be completed before July 7, 2009. The matter was continued to July 7, 2009 for status on discovery and for status on mediation.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
